setEffects.4: Increases Superconduct Reaction DMG by 80% and Stellar-Conduct Reaction DMG by 40%. When the wielder attacks opponents affected by Superconduct or Stellar-Conduct, this attack's CRIT Rate is increased by 16%.

flower.name: Iridescence That Ceased Amidst Glory
flower.desc: It was a flower made of silk, gifted to her by a friend whose hands were as cold as ice.

plume.name: Sharpness That Ceased Upon Wondrous Creation
plume.desc: It was a feathered quill given to her followers, once used to pen the most absurd of dreams.

sands.name: Moment That Ceased Upon Waking From Grand Dreams
sands.desc: It was a fleeting moment she gave a certain silent alchemist to remind him of every item on his schedule.

goblet.name: Ovations That Ceased Upon Festivity
goblet.desc: It was a goblet of wine she had accepted in celebration from the hands of a colleague.

circlet.name: Pendulum That Ceased Amidst a Great Fall
circlet.desc: It was a delicate trinket awarded to her in praise by the hand of her only master.
